title: Modern React Design Patterns & UI Architecture Examples
body: React has evolved far beyond simple component rendering. Modern enterprise applications demand scalable UI architecture, predictable behavior, modular design, and high performance—especially when building dashboards, SaaS platforms, portals, and complex frontends. This guide covers the most important React design patterns used in real-world enterprise systems, with examples and best practices.
